---
title: "Week 15: Class Presentations and Final Projects"
date: "2026-04-27"
---

### Tuesday

**Assignment Due:**

* Saturday: Feedback on final project to peers
* Tuesday / Thursday: Final Project Presentation
* Friday: [Final Project](/assignments/final_project/Final-project.qmd) on Brightspace
* Friday: [Final Self Assessment Reflection](/assignments/Final-Self-Assessment-Reflection.qmd) on Brightspace

**Class Schedule:**

- Final project presentations:
    - Julia / Bonnie
    - Noah / Canaan / Ella / Madison
    - Ayush
    - Gunveer
    - Sahil
    - Xiaoyang
    - Trinity
    - Noelle C.


### Thursday

**Class Schedule:**

* Final project presentations
    - Maria M.
    - Logan C.
    - Paige B.
    - Dean C.
    - Kiara C.
    - Colin B.
    - Rafael D.
    - Noelle W.

**Resources:**

* (Optional) [Advanced network visualizations in R](/assignments/advanced_visualizations.qmd)
